title: Tangy Silky Potato Stir-fry
description: This tangy and silky dish features baby new potatoes in a savory sauce that is both comforting and light, perfect for a monsoon-friendly meal. It's prepared with minimal ingredients to ensure it's safe for those on a fodmap diet.
instructions: Wash and peel baby new potatoes. Slice them into bite-sized pieces.
Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add sliced onions and sauté until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for another minute until fragrant but not browned.
Toss in the potato slices and continue to cook for another 5 minutes.
Pour in tomato puree and lemon juice. Stir well to combine all ingredients evenly.
Reduce heat to low, cover with a lid if your wok or skillet has one. Let it simmer gently until potatoes are tender, about 10-12 minutes.
Adjust seasoning with salt as needed.
Serve hot with a side of steamed vegetables or rice.
